full_text: Meiyappan to Bas de Leede, Caught by CP Rizwan!! That's a terrific catch by the skipper. He even gives the out verdict but the umpires are still going to refer it upstairs. The soft signal is OUT. "Very difficult to tell if the fingers are under the ball," umpire Rod Tucker. Different angles being shown now and the zoomer is also being used, "fingers under the ball with that angle," says Tucker. The final verdict is "No evidence to overturn the onfield call". Tossed up and de Leede comes down the track, drills the drive hard and low to cover, Rizwan dives sideways and takes it low. He was confident that his fingers were underneath and the umpires were also convinced.
